evals.prompt: Do a deepdive on Anthropic for me — I want a research brief I can use before applying.
evals.expected_output: reports/Anthropic_Research_Brief.docx + reports/Anthropic_investors.json; fit score referencing user.background + targets.roles from config; investors list flags any tier-1 VCs from deepdive.tier1_vcs.

evals.prompt: what do you think about Clay (clay.com, the GTM / sales-automation startup) — should I apply?
evals.expected_output: reports/Clay_Research_Brief.docx + reports/Clay_investors.json; GTM/sales industry is NOT in config's targets.industries list, so brief should honestly score lower on industry_match but still produce a real fit paragraph referencing user.background.
